title: Fast KeyBinds
description: This mod have 4 admin Keybinds, these 4 keybinds make your Creative World easier.
body:
Fast Keybinds
The Fast Keybinds mod adds simple and efficient hotkeys to make gameplay smoother and faster. No need to type commands — just press a key and instantly activate powerful functions:

F4: Toggle Speed Boost

F6: Instantly switch between Survival and Creative mode

F7: Toggle Night Vision

F8: Switch between Day and Night

Perfect for builders, explorers, and anyone who wants quick control without slowing down the game.
